/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE AND DEFENSE PC 17B MOTION/WITEXCL: DEFENSE/WIT SWORN:SFPD SERGEANT NICHOLAS DELGADO/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER FRANKIE KHANTIGNA/EXHMA: DEFENSE A- PHOTO OF PERSON//X: PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS:/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/ /X: PC 17B MOTION TOREDUCE:/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/X: DENIED AS MOOT,/CTORD: COUNTS 2 AND 4 (MISDEMEANORS) ARE CERTIFIED/871D:1 AND 3/OR/NTW/LDTR: 06-15-22/CONTD: PRETRIALCONFERENCE IN DEPARTMENT 17/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OFCOURT,/
/CAL: FURTHER PROCEEDINGS RE RELEASE CONDITIONS AND COMPLIANCE/CONT/DOP/X: THE HEARING DATE OF 05-16-22 IS CONFIRMED,/X: CASE IS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO ENTER PROGRAMMING AT BILLIE HOLIDAY CENTER FOR ASSESSMENT & RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO CHECK-IN WITH ACM 2 TIMES PER WEEK, IN PERSON/ACM/WEAP/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING (HOME DETENTION) BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH ANY & ALL PREVIOUSLY FILED STAY AWAY ORDERS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: RELEASE CONDITIONS & COMPLIANCE ON  05-02-22/X: 05-16-22 IS CONFIRMED FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X: ACM IS REQUESTING 2 MORE DAYS FOR UPDATEDREPORT/CONTD: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 04-21-22/X: 05-16-22 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONFIRMED/DOP/ X: CASE REMAINS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT CONTEMPT DISPOSITION AND CUSTODY STATUS/CTORD: DEFENDANT WAS NOT IN CONTEMPT FOR HIS 09-14-21 FAILURE TO APPEAR/BAIL: 50000/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT IN DEPARTMENT 12/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1HOUR/X: CASE IS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS,/
